# Rule Catalog

|---------|-----------|-------------|-------|
| L003 | OPA | Each play should have a name. |  |

| L005 | OPA | Use ansible.builtin or ansible.legacy. |  |

| L007 | OPA | Prefer command when no shell features needed. |  |
| L008 | OPA | Use delegate_to: localhost instead of local_action. |  |

| L010 | OPA | Use failed_when or register instead of ignore_errors. |  |
| L011 | OPA | Avoid literal true/false in when. |  |
| L012 | OPA | Avoid state=latest; pin package versions. |  |
| L013 | OPA | command/shell/raw need changed_when or creates/removes. |  |
| L014 | OPA | Use notify/handler instead of when: result.changed. |  |
| L015 | OPA | Avoid Jinja in when; use variables. |  |
| L016 | OPA | pause without seconds/minutes prompts for input. |  |
| L017 | OPA | Avoid relative path in src. |  |
| L018 | OPA | become_user should have corresponding become. |  |
| L019 | OPA | Playbook should have .yml or .yaml extension. |  |
| L020 | OPA | mode should be string with leading zero. |  |
| L021 | OPA | Set mode explicitly for file/copy/template. |  |
| L022 | OPA | Shell with pipe should set set -o pipefail. |  |
| L023 | OPA | Consider whether run_once is appropriate. |  |

| L062 | OPA | Use YAML-style module arguments, not key=value one-liners. |  |
| L063 | OPA | Block should have a name. |  |
| L064 | OPA | Avoid meta end_play; prefer meta end_host. |  |
| L065 | OPA | Play names should not contain Jinja expressions. |  |
| L066 | OPA | Do not mix roles and tasks in the same play. |  |
| L067 | OPA | Set verbosity on debug tasks to avoid noisy production output. |  |
| L068 | OPA | Avoid lineinfile; prefer template, ini_file, or blockinfile. |  |
| L069 | OPA | Batch package names in a list instead of looping with item. |  |
| L070 | OPA | Jinja in task names should only appear at the end of the name string. |  |
| L071 | OPA | Consider using template instead of copy with Jinja content. |  |
| L072 | OPA | Consider setting backup true on template/copy tasks. |  |
| L073 | Native | YAML should use 2-space indentation. |  |
| L074 | Native | Role names should not contain dashes. |  |
| L075 | Native | Templates should include ansible_managed comment. |  |
| L076 | Native | Use ansible_facts bracket notation instead of injected fact variables. |  |
| L077 | Native | Roles should have meta/argument_specs.yml for fail-fast parameter validation. |  |
| L078 | Native | Use bracket notation for dict key access in Jinja. |  |
| L079 | Native | Role defaults/vars should be prefixed with the role name. |  |
| L080 | Native | Internal role variables should be prefixed with __ (double underscore). |  |
| L081 | Native | Do not number roles or playbooks. |  |
| L082 | Native | Template source files should use .j2 extension. |  |
| L083 | Native | Do not hardcode host group names in roles. |  |
| L084 | Native | Task names in included sub-task files should use a prefix. |  |
| L085 | Native | Use explicit role_path prefix in include paths within roles. |  |
| L086 | Native | Avoid playbook/play vars for routine config; use inventory vars. |  |
| L087 | Native | Collection root should have a LICENSE or COPYING file. |  |
| L088 | Native | Collection README should document supported ansible-core versions. |  |
| L089 | Native | Plugin Python files should include type hints. |  |
| L090 | Native | Plugin entry files should be small; move helpers to module_utils. |  |
| L091 | Native | Use | bool for bare variables in when conditions. |  |
| L092 | Native | Avoid loop variable references in task names. |  |
| L093 | Native | Do not override role defaults/vars with set_fact. |  |

## Fixer Summary

Deterministic fixers (Tier 1) are auto-applied by `apme-scan fix --apply`.
Rules without fixers fall to Tier 2 (AI-proposable) or Tier 3 (manual review).
